features: Can be inflated with helium or air, use the pump or straw to inflate the balloon. When the inflation is completed, please put the ball to clamp flat, the ball will automatically come out sealing glue and last for a long time. release the helium and reuse the balloons.
Numbers can be combined by your will.Easily hung on ceilings with strings or attached to the wall with adhesive tape.This balloon is self-sealing, no binding with fingers required.
Material is aluminium film, colour uniform, spherical beautiful.
Ideal for a birthday party, wedding, Christmas, New Year's Eve, Halloween, anniversary, baby shower, graduation party.Perfect for all occasions.
